_doc: Hand-curated natural-language / synonym relevance judgments for the search eval harness (scripts/eval-search.js). Each entry maps a paraphrase to the doc paths a good ranker should surface. Targets are chosen to exist in test/golden/seed.js so the harness is runnable offline; judgments whose relevant paths are absent from the live corpus are skipped. Augmented at runtime by large auto-anchored exact-title judgments derived from the corpus itself.
